description: AgentServices provides paid APIs for AI agents with x402 micropayments on Base: 54 services, 97 endpoints, 41 x402-paid endpoints, and 37 MCP tools for crypto/DeFi market data, on-chain analytics, marketing intelligence, deep research, inference, and policy-driven dispute resolution.

notes: x402 payment challenges are returned for paid endpoints; free services are available without API-key setup.

clients: MCP-compatible clients and agent frameworks that support remote MCP servers.

notes: The hosted endpoint completed MCP initialize and tools/list checks on 2026-07-14.

On 2026-07-22, https://agentservices.to/.well-known/mcp.json and https://agentservices.to/openapi.json returned 200 with version 5.3.0 metadata. The /health endpoint returned 200 only when bypassing a TLS hostname mismatch for agentservices.to.
